title: Design System: Life Index — The Star-Loom

designAuthority.componentSnippetPolicy: components[].html and components[].css are reference examples only, not authoritative implementation.
designAuthority.conflictPolicy: DESIGN.md resolves design intent; this JSON must be synced before implementation follows a changed token or rule.
uiChangePreflight: Identify the relevant DESIGN.md named rule or JSON token before editing UI.
Use structured tokens and semantic classes before copying component snippets.
If a new visual value is introduced, update DESIGN.md intent and this JSON contract in the same workpack.
Local execution briefs for UI work must state whether DESIGN.md or this JSON changed.

surfaceMeta.purpose: Current production-aligned surface values. Hero Screen excludes the content readability overlay; all other UI surfaces use it. The Ether Surface hierarchy provides seven tiers of black-based opacity: ether-surface (0.39, Heavy) for main cards and search inputs; ether-surface-hover (0.46) for Heavy hover; ether-control (0.26, Medium) for secondary surfaces and buttons; ether-control-hover (0.34) for Medium hover; ether-panel (0.31) for expanded panels and option cards; ether-surface-light (0.16, Light) for nav capsules and tab bars; ether-surface-ghost (0.08, Ghost) for input fields, tags, and subtle buttons.

video.reducedMotionPolicy: Pause/freeze video playback while prefers-reduced-motion: reduce is active; resume when ordinary motion is allowed and the document is visible.
video.purpose: Playback-sized background video budget for the Star-Loom atmosphere. Avoid 4K source assets for persistent background playback.

particles.rendering: DOM div elements with CSS @keyframes animation, GPU-composited via transform and opacity. Do not use canvas shadowBlur, shadowColor, blur filters, or two-circle glow cores.
particles.purpose: Low-cost refined star-dust layer rendered as DOM particles with CSS animations for browser compositor-managed smoothness.

memoryFragments.rendering: No blur/filter animation. Static text-shadow is allowed for video-background readability; fragment motion must stay on opacity and transform only.
memoryFragments.purpose: Hero Screen memory quotes should whisper in without creating expensive text blur/raster spikes.

logo.fontFamily: Cinzel, Noto Serif SC, Georgia, serif
logo.purpose: Display-scale brand/logo treatment for hero and large brand surfaces. Divine voice. Paired with Brand Orb when scale permits.

navLogo.fontFamily: Cinzel, Noto Serif SC, Georgia, serif
navLogo.purpose: Compact top-left 'Life Index | 人生索引' production nav mark. Keep restrained; do not enlarge to display scale.

navLogoMobile.fontFamily: Cinzel, Noto Serif SC, Georgia, serif
navLogoMobile.purpose: Narrow-screen nav mark, about one-third visually smaller than the desktop mark and centered against the 40px mobile menu button.

telemetry.fontFamily: Geist Mono, JetBrains Mono, Courier New, monospace
telemetry.purpose: Coordinates, timestamps, stats readouts. Order voice.

display.fontFamily: Cinzel, Noto Serif SC, Georgia, serif
display.purpose: Page headlines, greeting. Divine voice. Mobile clamped to 1.625rem.

brand.fontFamily: Cinzel, Noto Serif SC, Georgia, serif
brand.purpose: Brand copy, product name, hero incantations, and page anchors.

control.fontFamily: Plus Jakarta Sans, Noto Sans SC, system-ui, sans-serif
control.purpose: Functional buttons, navigation, filters, language toggles, and form controls.

body.fontFamily: Noto Serif SC, Songti SC, serif
body.purpose: Editor content, descriptions. Narrative voice. Max line length 65–75ch.

fieldPlaceholder.fontFamily: Noto Serif SC, Songti SC, serif
fieldPlaceholder.purpose: Functional field placeholder prompts that should feel closer to the journal editor's Narrative voice while labels, entered values, and actions keep their own roles.

label.fontFamily: Geist Mono, JetBrains Mono, Courier New, monospace
label.purpose: Coordinates, metadata labels, diagnostics, and kicker text. Functional controls use Control voice.

caption.fontFamily: Geist Mono, JetBrains Mono, Courier New, monospace
caption.purpose: Dates, coordinates, stat labels. Order voice.

shadows.name: ether-rest
shadows.purpose: Default state of ether interface cards. No shadow — depth conveyed through transparency and background video.

shadows.name: ether-hover
shadows.purpose: Ether card hover. No shadow. Primary feedback is border brightening to gold, not shadow.

shadows.name: zen-glow
shadows.purpose: Ether Dissolve mode editor breathing glow. Softer, more diffuse gold aura. 4s ease-in-out infinite cycle.

shadows.name: save-condensation
shadows.purpose: Save instant burst gold radiance. Text drifts to center like stardust.

shadows.name: nav-fade
shadows.purpose: Top navigation uses tonal layering (gradient fade to transparent) instead of shadow.

motion.name: ease-smooth
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions. Exponential ease-out, no bounce.

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: Ether card hover lift, glow opacity.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Minimum for cinematic/layout transitions. Recommended 1.2s for Ether Dissolve enter/exit.

motion.name: duration-route
motion.purpose: Write/Search/Panel route fade transition. Search and Panel may include subtle blur; Write remains opacity-only.

motion.name: duration-ether
motion.purpose: Zen/Ether Dissolve choreography and other ritual transitions.

layoutMeta.purpose: Named visual geometry protocol. Adjust these tokens instead of scattering arbitrary px/vh values in TSX.

variantStyle.interactive: Clickable/action state reuses the default four-anchor cursor asset exactly. Interactivity is expressed by element hover/active feedback, not by adding a cursor icon, cyan dot, halo, or hand shape.
variantStyle.active: Keeps the four-anchor silhouette but slightly condenses the outline and darkens the fill to #030407. Uses no cyan ornament; pressed feedback should read as material compression, not decoration.
variantStyle.text: A black-and-white single fused I-beam contour drawn as one path beginning at M 12.20 6.25, with 1.8 white stroke. No cyan center line, no badge-shaped filled blob, and no overlapping pill/rectangle construction.

cursor.visualStyle: Four-anchor closed pointer traced from the reference: black filled shape, thin white outline, rounded A/B/D corners, and a 50% larger rounded inner C corner. Interactive state reuses the default cursor exactly, active uses dark compression with no cyan ornament, and text uses a clear single-contour black-and-white I-beam.
cursor.implementation: Static CSS cursor assets only on fine pointers. No DOM-following cursor and no pointermove animation. Interactive controls reuse the default pointer asset with pointer fallback; active controls use the press asset with pointer fallback; text inputs use the text asset with text fallback; disabled controls keep not-allowed.
cursor.purpose: Upgrade desktop cursor states using the owner's four-anchor reference while preserving browser semantic fallbacks.

microControl.purpose: Buttons, nav active states, hover/focus, input micro-feedback.

cinematicLayout.purpose: Large layout reveals, page composition shifts, hero incantation staging.

etherZen.purpose: Zen/Ether enter and exit choreography. Button collapse and editor expansion must share duration and easing.

blurPolicy.default: No backdrop-filter blur for default card/material surfaces.

componentSnippetPolicy.warning: Do not cargo-cult long components[].css snippets into production. They are visual examples and may lag behind production tokens.

components.name: Ether Interface
components.description: The atomic surface of the Star-Loom. Ultra-thin transparency with fading border corners. No inset highlight — thickness contradicts the ether suspension concept.
components.html:
Journal Entry

A quiet moment beneath the stars...
components.css: .ds-ether-card { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.39); border-radius: 24px; padding: 24px; color: #e8eaf0; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Source Han Serif SC', serif; } .ds-ether-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 24px; padding: 1px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.12) 0%, transparent 30%, transparent 70%, rgba(255,255,255,0.12) 100%); -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#fff 0 0); -webkit-mask-composite: xor; mask-composite: exclude; pointer-events: none; } .ds-ether-card:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.46); } .ds-ether-card:hover::before { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,231,146,0.15) 0%, transparent 30%, transparent 70%, rgba(255,231,146,0.15) 100%); } .ds-ether-card-title { font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.4; margin: 0 0 8px 0; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-ether-card-body { font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Source Han Serif SC', serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.8; color: #8a8f9c; margin: 0; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Transparent ether film with gold border. The save/weave action. No solid fill — the button itself is an ether membrane.
components.css: .ds-btn-weave { background: transparent; color: #ffe792; border: 1px solid rgba(255,231,146,0.3); border-radius: 100px; padding: 12px 32px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Noto Sans SC', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-weave:hover { background: rgba(255,231,146,0.08); border-color: rgba(255,231,146,0.5); } .ds-btn-weave:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-weave:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffe792; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent background with muted text and subtle white border. For secondary actions and filters.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #8a8f9c; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 100px; padding: 8px 20px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Noto Sans SC', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color: #e8eaf0; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffe792; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Ether field for functional search. Entered values keep Control voice/readability styling; placeholder prompts use Field Placeholder voice, no hover lift, and a collapsible date option card below.
components.css: .ds-input-warp { width: 100%; min-height: 64px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.39); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 24px; padding: 0 24px; color: #e8eaf0; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Noto Sans SC', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.2; outline: none; transition: border-color 300ms ease, box-shadow 300ms ease, background-color 300ms ease; } .ds-input-warp:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.46); transform: none; } .ds-input-warp::placeholder { color: #818695; font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Source Han Serif SC', serif; font-size: clamp(0.875rem, 0.9vw, 0.9375rem); font-style: italic; letter-spacing: normal; text-transform: none; } .ds-input-warp:focus { border-color: rgba(255,231,146,0.35); box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(255,231,146,0.1), 0 0 40px rgba(255,231,146,0.05); } .ds-search-options { margin-top: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 20px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.31); padding: 16px; }

components.name: Top Navigation Capsule
components.description: Desktop floating capsule with bilingual labels. Transparent light-frosted glass, not a filled nav bar. Control voice for links, Divine voice for brand.
components.html: 写入 WRITE 搜索 SEARCH 面板 PANEL
components.css: .ds-nav-track { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.16); backdrop-filter: blur(9px) saturate(140%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(9px) saturate(140%); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.08), 0 18px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.28); border-radius: 100px; padding: 6px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Noto Sans SC', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 100px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8a8f9c; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.3s ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-nav-link span { font-size: 0.625rem; opacity: 0.5; margin-left: 2px; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #e8eaf0; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #ffe792; background: rgba(255,231,146,0.1); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffe792; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: FAB (Floating Action Button)
components.description: Transparent circular button with gold border. The 'weave' action. Hover triggers subtle stardust swirl.
components.html:
<button class="ds-fab-weave" aria-label="Write new journal">
  <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line></svg>
</button>
components.css: .ds-fab-weave { position: fixed; bottom: 40px; right: 40px; width: 56px; height: 56px; background: transparent; color: #ffe792; border: 1px solid rgba(255,231,146,0.4); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); z-index: 90; } .ds-fab-weave:hover { border-color: rgba(255,231,146,0.7); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,231,146,0.15); } .ds-fab-weave:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-fab-weave:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffe792; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Topic Chip
components.description: Selectable pill tag for journal topics. Color-coded by category. Order voice.
components.css: .ds-chip { padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 100px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Noto Sans SC', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); color: #8a8f9c; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-chip:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-chip--selected { background: rgba(255,231,146,0.08); color: #ffe792; border-color: rgba(255,231,146,0.2); } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffe792; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Celestial Loader
components.description: Dual-orbit spinning loader with breathing gold core. Thinner lines (1px) for reduced presence. Order voice for loading text.
components.css: .ds-loader { position: relative; width: 64px; height: 64px; } .ds-loader-orbit-outer { position: absolute; inset: 0; border: 1px solid rgba(255,231,146,0.15); border-top-color: #ffe792; border-radius: 50%; animation: ds-spin 2s linear infinite; } .ds-loader-orbit-inner { position: absolute; width: 48px; height: 48px; top: 8px; left: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(133,255,242,0.15); border-bottom-color: #85fff2; border-radius: 50%; animation: ds-spin 1.5s linear infinite reverse; } .ds-loader-core { position: absolute; width: 10px; height: 10px; top: 27px; left: 27px; background: #ffe792; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,231,146,0.5), 0 0 16px rgba(255,231,146,0.2); animation: ds-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.7; } 50% { transform: scale(1.15); opacity: 1; } }

components.name: Brand Orb
components.description: 32px container with 10px gold dot, 22px ring, and 6s breathing halo. The brand's celestial signature.
components.css: .ds-brand-orb { position: relative; width: 32px; height: 32px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-brand-orb-dot { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ffe792; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(201,176,127,0.6); } .ds-brand-orb-ring { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1.5px solid rgba(201,176,127,0.25); } .ds-brand-orb-ring::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -3px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid rgba(201,176,127,0.08); animation: ds-orb-breathe 6s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-orb-breathe { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.3; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.7; transform: scale(1.08); } }

components.name: Memory Fragment
components.description: Floating historical journal quote on hero screen. 16s cycle: 4s emerge / 8s linger / 4s dissolve. Narrative voice.
components.html: "今夜的风穿过阳台..." 2024.03
components.css: .ds-memory-fragment { position: absolute; font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Source Han Serif SC', serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(232,234,240,0.5); max-width: 320px; pointer-events: none; text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.9), 0 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 0 120px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); will-change: opacity, transform; contain: layout paint style; } .ds-memory-fragment .ds-memory-date { font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: rgba(138,143,156,0.6); margin-left: 8px; } @keyframes ds-memory-emerge { 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); } 12.5% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); } 31.25% { opacity: 0.45; transform: translateY(0); } 75% { opacity: 0.5; transform: translateY(-3px); } 87.5% { opacity: 0.3; transform: translateY(-6px); } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px); } }

components.name: Fixed Write Greeting
components.description: Stable Write page bilingual greeting. Primary language uses Divine/Narrative voice; secondary language keeps Page Subtitle scale so it aligns with Recall and Archives.
components.html:
夜幕已降，织星者。

The night has fallen, Starweaver.
components.css: .ds-greeting { text-align: center; position: relative; padding: 0 2rem; } .ds-greeting::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 24px; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 50% 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 50%, transparent 80%); pointer-events: none; z-index: -1; } .ds-greeting-cn { font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Source Han Serif SC', serif; font-size: 1.375rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.035em; color: #e8eaf0; margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0; text-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.9), 0 0 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 0 120px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.9); } .ds-greeting-en { font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8a8f9c; opacity: 0.62; margin: 0; }

components.name: The Warp Transition
components.description: Page transition: Search and Panel fade with a subtle blur; Write uses opacity-only fade. No hard cuts between Write, Search, and Panel.
components.css: .ds-warp-exit { animation: ds-route-out 420ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1) forwards; } .ds-warp-enter { animation: ds-route-in 420ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1) forwards; } .ds-warp-exit--write { animation-name: ds-route-out-write; } .ds-warp-enter--write { animation-name: ds-route-in-write; } @keyframes ds-route-out { from { opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); } to { opacity: 0; filter: blur(6px); } } @keyframes ds-route-in { from { opacity: 0; filter: blur(6px); } to { opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); } } @keyframes ds-route-out-write { from { opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); } to { opacity: 0; filter: blur(0); } } @keyframes ds-route-in-write { from { opacity: 0; filter: blur(0); } to { opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); } }

narrative.overview: Life Index 的 UI 是一片深邃的以太虚空，星轨在背景中永恒运转。所有界面元素不是'贴'在这片虚空上的面板，而是悬浮在以太力场中的织线——它们允许星光穿透，与背景的光影产生物理层面的交融。系统拒绝 SaaS 工具的工业感，拒绝 AI 产品的廉价霓虹，拒绝一切试图用厚重边框和实体卡片去'框住'内容的陈旧范式。每一个界面都是最终品质 —— Screenshot is Spreading（截图即传播）。
keyCharacteristics: Dark-only: 深渊背景 #0a0c12，无浅色模式。暗室观星的物理场景决定了主题。
Ether transparency: 界面元素是悬浮在以太力场中的织线，允许星光穿透。mix-blend-mode: screen 仅用于装饰性边框和图标；正文文本使用多层 text-shadow 模拟光影穿透，禁止对正文直接使用 screen。
Fading borders: 卡片边框不是均匀的 1px 线条，而是渐变消隐线条——四角微亮，向中部逐渐消隐至透明。
Restrained motion: micro/control 交互 300-420ms，route fade 约 420ms，layout/cinematic 800-1200ms，Ether/Zen 约 1200ms；统一使用 cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1)，禁止弹簧、弹跳、弹性效果。
Triple-voice typography: 古典衬线体承载神性标题，等宽字体承载秩序与坐标，人文宋体承载情感与叙事。三种声部交织成织卷的韵律。
Bilingual hierarchy: 页面标题区使用固定中英文组合，第二语言使用 Page Subtitle 层级并降低亮度；导航中的英文 micro-label 才使用 0.625rem 下标。
Content-max discipline: 核心交互区严格限制 800px 最大宽度并绝对居中，拒绝宽屏下的视线横向游移。
Page composition contract: 页面级布局必须使用相对视口槽位管理，不用截图像素硬调。导航下方留白、标题槽、核心交互槽之间使用 dvh/grid/flex slot 表达；核心交互区同时声明 width: 100% 与 max-width: 800px，避免在不同浏览器或缩放下按内容宽度收缩。

rules.name: The One Gold Rule
rules.body: 琥珀金在任意屏幕上使用面积 ≤10%。它的稀有性才是其价值。如果某个界面看起来'很金'，说明用多了。

rules.name: The Void-First Rule
rules.body: 背景永远是深渊。任何试图用浅色卡片或亮色底来'提亮'的设计都是对该系统的背叛。

rules.name: The Light-Penetration Rule
rules.body: 界面元素必须允许背景星光穿透。mix-blend-mode: screen 用于装饰性边框和图标，允许星光自然照亮边缘。但正文文本不得使用 screen——在视频背景的明亮星尘区域会导致对比度灾难性丢失。正文文本使用多层 text-shadow 模拟星光穿透感。

rules.name: The No-Blur Rule
rules.body: 系统拒绝 backdrop-filter: blur() 作为默认材质。以太悬浮感通过极薄底色 + 渐变消隐边框 + mix-blend-mode: screen 实现。blur 仅用于顶部导航胶囊、移动端右上角菜单框体等小面积导航场景，半径统一 9px；数据图表的临时 tooltip 可作为可读性例外使用不超过 8px 的局部 blur。不得用于大面积卡片、页面遮罩或持久内容面板。

rules.name: The Starweaver Cursor Rule
rules.body: Cursor 体验使用静态 CSS cursor 资产，不使用 DOM 跟随式假光标、持续 pointermove、粒子或滤镜动画。默认和可点击资产必须遵守四锚点轮廓：A/B/C/D 依次连成封闭图形，黑色填充、白色薄描边；A/B/D 为同半径圆滑转角，C 为 1.5 倍半径圆滑内凹转角。实现只在 (pointer: fine) 启用；普通区域 fallback 为 auto，按钮、链接和可点击区域 fallback 为 pointer，按下态使用同轮廓压实变体，文本输入、日期输入和可编辑区域使用同风格 I-beam 变体并 fallback 为 text，禁用控件保留 not-allowed。可点击态复用默认箭头，不引入额外图标或点状装饰；按下态不得使用 cyan 装饰；文本态必须是一眼读作 I-beam 的单一融合轮廓，不能由重叠药丸或分离矩形拼成。

rules.name: The No-Heavy-Glass Rule
rules.body: 卡片不再是'厚玻璃'。它们是一片片轻薄的以太薄膜，悬浮在星轨之上。用户应该能透过卡片看到背后运转的星系。

rules.name: The Content Readability Overlay Rule
rules.body: 除 Hero Screen 待机首屏外，所有界面必须启用全局半透明黑色遮罩层（位于视频背景之上、粒子层之下），用于统一降低背景动画亮度并提高前景元素可读性。

rules.name: The Font Voice Rule
rules.body: 品牌文案使用 Brand voice：Cinzel / Noto Serif SC；功能按钮、导航、筛选、语言切换和表单控制使用 Control voice：Plus Jakarta Sans / Noto Sans SC；长文本与写作正文使用 Narrative voice：Noto Serif SC / Source Han Serif SC；等宽 Order voice 仅保留给坐标、数值、诊断、kicker 等秩序信息。

rules.name: The Field Placeholder Voice Rule
rules.body: 功能性输入框的 placeholder（搜索、智能检索、元数据、导入路径等）不是导航/按钮 Control voice，也不是 Order label。它应向写入页日志输入框的叙事提示靠近：使用 Narrative voice（var(--font-narrative)）、--text-field-placeholder、italic、normal letter spacing、no uppercase；placeholder 颜色保持 var(--color-secondary)。已输入值、字段标签和操作按钮仍保留各自声部。

rules.name: The Field Placeholder Scale Rule
rules.body: 功能性 placeholder 不按页面逐个截图调参，统一消费 --text-field-placeholder。该 token 的最大值不得超过页面标题最小字号（--text-page-title 下限）的 80%；当前上限为 0.9375rem，低于 1.25rem * 0.8 = 1rem，保证 placeholder 永远退居页面标题之后。

rules.name: The Bilingual Subtitle Rule
rules.body: 中英混排时，第二语言必须退居次要：更低的透明度、必要时 uppercase；但页面标题区的副标题仍使用 Page Subtitle 层级，不得退到导航 micro-label 字号。

rules.name: The Fixed Page Incantation Rule
rules.body: 写入、搜索、面板三大主页面使用固定的中英文标题组合，而不是每个 route 临时写一套单语标题。搜索页固定为“穿梭至某个时空坐标... / Warp to a space-time coordinate”，面板页固定为“星图面板 / Constellation Panel”，写入页固定为 Starweaver 夜间织线文案。语言切换时，当前语言文本成为主标题，另一语言退到副标题。

rules.name: The Search Date Options Rule
rules.body: 搜索页不使用一排常驻 chips。日期筛选放入可展开的 Ether option card，提供起始/结束日期输入；搜索输入 hover 只允许轻微变色，不允许上浮。

rules.name: The Panel Card Voice Rule
rules.body: 面板页统计、热力图、主题、情绪、入口卡片必须共用 kicker/title/value/copy 语言：英文或坐标层用秩序声部 kicker，紧凑卡片标题可用 Control voice，数值用秩序声部 value。不得把面板小卡片标题做成 Display 层级，也不得为图表卡片另设厚重蓝灰渐变。

rules.name: The Voice-Layering Rule
rules.body: 同一界面中，声部不得混作一团。Brand voice 负责锚定（品牌/标题），Control voice 负责动作（按钮/导航/筛选），Narrative voice 负责内容（正文/写作），Order voice 只负责坐标、数值、诊断与 kicker。

rules.name: The Page Rhythm Rule
rules.body: 页面标题、双语副标题、核心交互区必须共用页面级节奏。Route 不应在组件内部用孤立 mt/mb 或截图像素决定垂直位置；用固定语义槽位管理视觉重心。写入页欢迎词属于编辑器 preface，不是 hero/display title，字号不得超过 Headline 层级，副标题字号必须与搜索/面板页面副标题一致。

rules.name: The Design Contract Rule
rules.body: DESIGN.md 决定视觉意图和规则优先级；design/tokens.json 记录可执行 token、阈值与 rule metadata；src/styles/tailwind.css 负责实现。tokens.json 中的 component HTML/CSS snippet 只是参考示例，不得覆盖 token 和 named rules。任何 UI 修改如引入新数值，必须同步这两层设计文档或明确说明未触及 token。

rules.name: The Visual Geometry Protocol
rules.body: 关键页面几何必须通过命名 token 与语义 class 管理，而不是在 TSX 中散落 arbitrary px/vh 调参。导航占位使用 --layout-nav-clearance，Hero 可见高度使用 --layout-hero-height，Hero 欢迎词/底部提示分别使用 --hero-welcome-top-slot 与 --hero-prompt-bottom-slot，写入框与抽屉使用 --write-editor-min-height 与 --write-drawer-gap。

rules.name: The Hero Incantation Position Rule
rules.body: Hero Screen 的 Welcome Back / Starweaver 待机欢迎词必须位于亮色星轨核心上方，通过 --hero-welcome-top-slot 管理顶部距离；不得与视频最亮区域重叠；入场使用约 2.5s opacity 慢显和极轻微上浮归位；Click Anywhere 通过 --hero-prompt-bottom-slot 管理，不得在 TSX 中临时写 pb-[...] 或擅自上移到背景亮核区域。

rules.name: The Particle Sparkle Rule
rules.body: 背景粒子应接近精致亮青星屑：低密度 25-35 个，半径约 1.0-3.5px，以 DOM div + CSS @keyframes 渲染，由浏览器 GPU 合成器管理。颜色：亮青 60%、琥珀金 20%、珊瑚 20%。不使用 shadow blur 或模糊光晕；通过单个清晰星点的生命周期 alpha 淡入淡出建立存在感，不得像暗灰尘或高成本霓虹尘埃。

rules.name: The Background Motion Budget Rule
rules.body: 背景运动是氛围而不是主角。视频背景使用 playback-sized 1080p H.264 资产；prefers-reduced-motion: reduce 下必须冻结视频播放和装饰性粒子循环，恢复普通 motion 或页面从 hidden 返回 visible 时再继续播放。

rules.name: The Memory Fragment Performance Rule
rules.body: Hero Screen 记忆碎片必须像低声浮现，而不是高成本雾化文字。碎片动画只允许 opacity + transform；禁止 filter / backdrop-filter / blur() 和 animated text-shadow。静态 text-shadow 可保留用于视频背景可读性，但元素必须用 will-change: opacity, transform 与 contain: layout paint style 将重绘局部化。

rules.name: The Mobile Menu Typography Rule
rules.body: 窄屏右上角菜单属于导航系统。菜单项、英文副标、语言切换按钮必须统一使用 Control voice（var(--font-control)）、0.08em tracking 和项目导航层级字号；不能退回浏览器默认字体。弹出框体使用更不透明的深色底（约 0.63 alpha）+ backdrop-filter: blur(9px) saturate(140%)；开合仍只使用轻量 opacity/transform，不使用巨幅 shadow 或 scale 组合动画。

rules.name: The Hero Scroll Lock Rule
rules.body: Hero Screen 是首屏待机场景，宽屏和窄屏都必须锁定页面滚动；未进入写入 surface 前，不允许隐藏的写入内容撑出可滚动文档高度。

rules.name: The Write Drawer Proximity Rule
rules.body: 写入页元数据/附件抽屉属于同一 800px workbench，应贴着编辑器下方展开，只保留一个短节奏间距；不得被页面级 min-height 或 viewport slot 推到屏幕下方。

dos: Do 让琥珀金保持稀有。任意屏幕上金色使用面积 ≤10%。
Do 使用 cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1) 作为所有过渡的标准缓动。
Do 按 motion tier 使用时长：micro/control 300-420ms，route fade 约 420ms，layout/cinematic 800-1200ms，Zen/Ether 约 1200ms。以太隐退与进入对称同速。
Do 将核心交互区限制在 800px 最大宽度并绝对居中。
Do 以中文为主、英文为辅进行导航标注。英文必须是微型下标。
Do 优先使用 transform 和 opacity 做动画；必要的几何变化只能通过命名 CSS 变量、grid/flex track 或语义 class 编排，禁止在组件里临时动画化 width、height、margin。
Do 保持粒子层低密度（≤50）、低速度、低存在感。它们是深渊中的生命感，不是主角；不要用 shadow blur 制造持续 GPU 光晕。
Do 允许背景星光穿透界面元素。mix-blend-mode: screen 用于装饰边框和图标，正文使用 text-shadow 多层阴影模拟光影穿透。
Do 使用渐变消隐边框替代均匀边框。四角微亮，中部消隐。
donts: Don't 使用 backdrop-filter: blur() 作为默认材质。除顶部导航胶囊、移动端菜单框体和不超过 8px 的临时图表 tooltip 外，优先使用深色半透明底、细边框和短 opacity/transform 动画。
Don't 使用弹簧/弹跳/弹性动画。spring、bounce、elastic 全部被禁止。
Don't 使用渐变文字（background-clip: text）。强调通过字重和字号实现，而非装饰性渐变。
Don't 使用 #000 或 #fff。即使是中性色也要向品牌色调偏移。
Don't 在组件命名中偏离 BIS 体系。保留 The Core / Recall / Archives 三个页面英文名，其余全部按 BIS 命名。
Don't 将 retired local archives, prototypes, tool outputs, or historical workpacks 当作新的规范来源。
Don't 让以太隐退模式下的非核心元素通过 display: none 或独立 height: 0 突然消失。若按钮区折叠到 0，必须与输入区等量、同速、同 easing 伸展绑定，保持整体编辑器轮廓稳定。
Don't 直接复制粘贴 Stitch/Bolt 等 AI 生成的 code.html。必须经过转化协议。
Don't 在同一层级混用三种字体声部。神性、秩序、叙事必须各司其职。
Don't 对正文文本使用 mix-blend-mode: screen。视频明亮区域会导致可读性灾难。
Don't 使用厚重的实体卡片边框和内阴影。卡片应该是轻薄的以太薄膜。
